allow: Bash(# Check if tailwindcss is globally available which tailwindcss || tailwindcss --version || echo ""not globally installed"" # Also check npm global list npm list -g --depth=0)

Bash(# Check file sizes and inspect woff2 headers for variable font marker # Variable fonts contain an ''fvar'' table — we can look for it in the binary FONT_DIR=""/c/Users/timda/Local Sites/wallaroo-bbq-boats/app/public/wp-content/themes/wallaroo-bbq-boats/assets/fonts"" echo ""=== File sizes ==="" ls -lh ""$FONT_DIR"" echo """" echo ""=== Inter-Regular.woff2 — searching for fvar table \(variable font marker\) ==="" # fvar in hex is 66 76 61 72 — look for the string in the binary xxd ""$FONT_DIR/Inter-Regular.woff2"" | grep -c ""fvar"" || strings ""$FONT_DIR/Inter-Regular.woff2"")
Bash(for f in functions.php header.php footer.php front-page.php index.php inc/theme-options.php inc/acf-fields.php)
Bash("$MYSQL" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 10108 -u root -proot local -e "DESCRIBE wp_wbb_availability; DESCRIBE wp_wbb_bookings;")

Bash("$MYSQL" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 10108 -u root -proot local -e "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \\`wp_wbb_boats\\` \(\\`id\\` int\(11\) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, \\`name\\` varchar\(100\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '''', \\`active\\` tinyint\(1\) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''1'', \\`sort_order\\` int\(11\) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''0'', \\`created_at\\` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT ''0000-00-00 00:00:00'', PRIMARY KEY \(\\`id\\`\)\) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")

Bash(__NEW_LINE_6e29cb240afc5c1c__ "$MYSQL" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 10108 -u root -proot local -e "ALTER TABLE \\`wp_wbb_bookings\\` ADD COLUMN \\`boat_id\\` int\(11\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER \\`booking_ref\\`;")

Bash(__NEW_LINE_6e29cb240afc5c1c__ "$MYSQL" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 10108 -u root -proot local -e "ALTER TABLE \\`wp_wbb_bookings\\` ADD COLUMN \\`price_per_boat\\` decimal\(8,2\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00 AFTER \\`boats_requested\\`;")
Bash("$MYSQL" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 10108 -u root -proot local -e "SELECT option_value FROM \\`wp_options\\` WHERE option_name = ''wbb_db_version'';")

Bash(perl -0777 -pi -e 's/\\$step_labels = array\\\(.*?\\\);\\s*?\\n\\s*foreach \\\( \\$step_labels as \\$num => \\$label \\\) :/\\/\\/ \\$step_labels and \\$total_steps are built above \(adapt to Extras step\).\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\$display_num = 0;\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tforeach \( \\$step_labels as \\$num => \\$label \) :\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\$display_num++;/s' includes/class-shortcode.php)
Bash(perl -pi -e 's/id="wbb-panel-4" data-step="4"/id="wbb-panel-<?php echo esc_attr\( \\$step_details \); ?>" data-step="<?php echo esc_attr\( \\$step_details \); ?>"/' includes/class-shortcode.php)
Bash(perl -pi -e 's/id="wbb-panel-5" data-step="5"/id="wbb-panel-<?php echo esc_attr\( \\$step_review \); ?>" data-step="<?php echo esc_attr\( \\$step_review \); ?>"/' includes/class-shortcode.php)

PowerShell($p = Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Local\\lightning-services","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Local" -Recurse -Filter php.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName; if \($p\) { $p } else { "none found" })

PowerShell($roots = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA","C:\\Program Files","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)"\) ; foreach \($r in $roots\) { Get-ChildItem -Path $r -Recurse -Filter php.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 2 -ExpandProperty FullName } 2>$null)
